title: Japanese Heritage Pack
description: An Immersive Railroading pack based on Japan
body:
# Japanese Heritage Pack
Japanese Heritage Pack is a resoucepack addon for Immersive Railroading, as such, it does not any block/vanilla replacement textures, only content for the Immersive Railroading mod. The Pack is focused around JNR/Older Era of Japanese railroading, The pack is currently still in early beta, but plans for major expansion are in the works. All stock currently are all 3’6” (1067mm) Narrow Gauge.

A Special Thanks to Autism | Tristan for doing the fancy textures.

**Requires Immersive railroading: [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-railroading?gameCategorySlug=mc-mods&projectID=277736)**

# Current Stock List:
- JNR ED16 Electric Locomotive 
- JNR Boxcar
- JNR Caboose/Brake Van
- JNR Passenger car (Oh-60)
